[Unit]
Description=Telegram Bot on Claude
After=network.target

[Service]
Type=simple
WorkingDirectory=/root/Iryna_Karmazina
ExecStart=/root/Iryna_Karmazina/venv/bin/python /root/Iryna_Karmazina/agent_bot.py
Restart=always
RestartSec=5
EnvironmentFile=-/root/Iryna_Karmazina/.env

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target
